import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class DKT(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=128, hidden_dim=128, num_layers=2, dropout=0.3, nhead=4):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.inter_embed = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills + 1, embed_dim, padding_idx=0)
        self.skill_embed = nn.Embedding(num_skills + 1, embed_dim, padding_idx=0)
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout if num_layers>1 else 0.0)
        self.attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(hidden_dim, nhead, dropout=dropout, batch_first=True)
        self.norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.q_proj = nn.Linear(embed_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.out = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim*2 + embed_dim, hidden_dim), nn.ReLU(), nn.Dropout(dropout), nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)
        )

    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, lengths):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        device = skill_ids.device
        valid = (torch.arange(T, device=device).unsqueeze(0) < lengths.unsqueeze(1)).long()
        inter = (skill_ids * 2 + corrects + 1) * valid
        x = self.inter_embed(inter)
        h, _ = self.lstm(x)  # [B, T, H]
        h = self.dropout(h)
        # query is next skill embedding at positions 0..T-2 -> attends over h[:, :t+1]
        next_skill = (skill_ids[:, 1:] + 1)  # [B, T-1]
        q = self.q_proj(self.skill_embed(next_skill))  # [B, T-1, H]
        # attention: q at pos t attends to h[0..t]
        Tm1 = T - 1
        # build causal mask: q_t can attend to k positions 0..t (i.e., k <= t)
        attn_mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(Tm1, T, device=device), diagonal=1).bool()  # for k>=t+1 mask
        # But we want q_t to see h_0..h_t (k up to t). attn_mask shape (Tq, Tk)
        # mask True = disallow. For row t, disallow k > t.
        # key padding mask
        key_pad = ~(torch.arange(T, device=device).unsqueeze(0) < lengths.unsqueeze(1))
        attn_out, _ = self.attn(q, h, h, attn_mask=attn_mask, key_padding_mask=key_pad, need_weights=False)
        attn_out = self.norm(attn_out)
        h_prev = h[:, :-1]
        s_emb = self.skill_embed(next_skill)
        feat = torch.cat([h_prev, attn_out, s_emb], dim=-1)
        logits = self.out(feat).squeeze(-1)
        return logits
